ksa_text: Ability to synthesize strategic intelligence from multiple information sources, integrating market trends, competitive intelligence, organizational data, and technology evolution into coherent strategic recommendations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.433) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Operations. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Operations roles increasingly include Leadership & Strategy competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Operations now include Leadership & Strategy competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Leadership & Strategy ability KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Operations based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
